labels.name: story
labels.value: 申诉管理 - 获取申诉列表

parameters.name: case_data
parameters.value: {'api_name': '获取待申诉列表', 'path': '/api/products/admin/appeals/', 'method': 'GET', 'content_type': 'application/json', 'auth_required': True, 'auth_type': 'admin', 'headers': {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36', 'Accept': 'application/json, text/plain, */*', 'Accept-Language': 'zh-CN,zh;q=0.9', 'X-CSRFToken': '${csrf_token}'}, 'module': 'admin', 'source_file': 'appeal_list.yaml', 'id': 'TC-ADMIN-019-1', 'name': '成功获取待申诉列表', 'description': '管理员成功获取待申诉列表', 'data': {}, 'path_params': {}, 'query_params': {}, 'files': {}, 'expected': {'status_code': 200, 'response_headers': {'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, 'check_points': ['isinstance(resp_json, list)', 'len(resp_json) >= 0', 'all(isinstance(item, dict) for item in resp_json)', "all('id' in item and 'product' in item and 'buyer' in item and 'seller' in item for item in resp_json)", "all('appeal_status' in item and 'appeal_status_display' in item for item in resp_json)", "all(isinstance(item.get('evidence_photos', []), list) for item in resp_json)", "all(isinstance(item.get('appeal_evidence_photos', []), list) for item in resp_json)"]}, 'setup': [], 'teardown': [], 'tags': ['smoke', 'p0', '管理员', '正常场景']}
